name: Arrow Exploration Corp.
summary: Arrow Exploration Corp., a junior oil and gas company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, development, and production of oil and gas properties in Colombia and Western Canada. As of December 31, 2019, it holds interests in seven oil blocks in Colombia that covers an area of approximately 342,107 net acres; and oil and natural gas leases in seven areas in Canada covering an area of approximately 59,830 net acres. The company is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
